## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to review Datagrid's performance metrics and align on content strategy adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/usXCy_926zZUhU2qT3zRHM8yv6GE1udJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Record-breaking performance**: New highs across all metrics, particularly in organic channels (Google/Bing)](https://fathom.video/share/usXCy_926zZUhU2qT3zRHM8yv6GE1udJ?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**Non-branded growth**: Surpassed 100K non-branded impressions (up from \~100 seven months ago)](https://fathom.video/share/usXCy_926zZUhU2qT3zRHM8yv6GE1udJ?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**Content strategy pivot**: Canceling social recording; shifting to in-house. Developing 6-month plan for newsletter/listicles](https://fathom.video/share/usXCy_926zZUhU2qT3zRHM8yv6GE1udJ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - **SEO wins**: Now ranking \#1 for 146 non-branded keywords (+10 from last week). AI agents for real estate showing high promise
